tasks.label: diagnosticar-remmina-waydroid
args:
cd /home/hugodeco/.config/remmina && printf '%s
' '--- arquivos ---' && ls -l Waydroid-CT-8010.remmina waydroid-vnc.crt /home/hugodeco/.ssh/id_ed25519 2>&1 && printf '%s
' '--- teste ssh/vnc remoto ---' && ssh -i /home/hugodeco/.ssh/id_ed25519 -p 26492 -o BatchMode=yes -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new -o ConnectTimeout=10 root@143.208.224.38 'printf "SSH_OK
"; if timeout 5 bash -lc "</dev/tcp/172.16.1.17/5900" 2>/dev/null; then printf "VNC_172_OK
"; else printf "VNC_172_FAIL
"; fi; if timeout 5 bash -lc "</dev/tcp/127.0.0.1/5900" 2>/dev/null; then printf "VNC_LOOPBACK_OK
"; else printf "VNC_LOOPBACK_FAIL
"; fi'

tasks.label: diagnosticar-remmina-waydroid-2
args: cd /home/hugodeco/.config/remmina && printf "%s\n" "--- arquivos ---" && ls -l Waydroid-CT-8010.remmina waydroid-vnc.crt /home/hugodeco/.ssh/id_ed25519 2>&1 && printf "%s\n" "--- teste ssh/vnc remoto ---" && ssh -i /home/hugodeco/.ssh/id_ed25519 -p 26492 -o BatchMode=yes -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new -o ConnectTimeout=10 root@143.208.224.38 "printf \"SSH_OK\\n\"; if timeout 5 bash -lc \"</dev/tcp/172.16.1.17/5900\" 2>/dev/null; then printf \"VNC_172_OK\\n\"; else printf \"VNC_172_FAIL\\n\"; fi; if timeout 5 bash -lc \"</dev/tcp/127.0.0.1/5900\" 2>/dev/null; then printf \"VNC_LOOPBACK_OK\\n\"; else printf \"VNC_LOOPBACK_FAIL\\n\"; fi"

tasks.label: inspecionar-rfb-waydroid
args: ssh -i /home/hugodeco/.ssh/id_ed25519 -p 26492 -o BatchMode=yes -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new -o ConnectTimeout=10 root@143.208.224.38 "python3 -c 'import socket; s=socket.create_connection((\"172.16.1.17\",5900),5); banner=s.recv(12); print(\"BANNER\", repr(banner)); s.sendall(b\"RFB 003.008\\n\"); data=s.recv(64); print(\"SECURITY_TYPES\", list(data), repr(data)); s.close()'"

tasks.label: inspecionar-rfb-waydroid-2
args: import socket; s=socket.create_connection(('172.16.1.17',5900),5); banner=s.recv(12); print('BANNER', repr(banner)); s.sendall(b'RFB 003.008\n'); data=s.recv(64); print('SECURITY_TYPES', list(data), repr(data)); s.close()

tasks.label: inspecionar-rfb-waydroid-3
tasks.command: ssh -i /home/hugodeco/.ssh/id_ed25519 -p 26492 -o BatchMode=yes -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new -o ConnectTimeout=10 root@143.208.224.38 "python3 -c \"import socket; host=\\\"172.16.1.17\\\"; s=socket.create_connection((host,5900),5); banner=s.recv(12); print(\\\"BANNER\\\",repr(banner)); s.sendall(b\\\"RFB 003.008\\\\n\\\"); data=s.recv(64); print(\\\"SECURITY_TYPES\\\",list(data),repr(data)); s.close()\""

tasks.label: diagnosticar-vnc-pam-waydroid
args:
printf '%s
' '--- pam weston ---'; cat /etc/pam.d/weston-remote-access 2>/dev/null || true; printf '%s
' '--- root/user status ---'; getent passwd root || true; passwd -S root 2>/dev/null || true; printf '%s
' '--- weston process ---'; pgrep -a weston || true
